creator: redchin@gmail.com
text:
rsync fails with files large then 2gb unless compiled with --enable-largefile
this option is not exposed through OPTIONS. It should be either exposed through OPTIONS or even just set in the CONFIGURE_ARGS

Fix: 

build rsync with --enable-largefile
How-To-Repeat: install rsync from pors, and try and rsync a a 4gb file
